records.m_Talk_ENG: Hohoho! What do you think, people from beyond the screen?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hohoho! What do you think, people from beyond the screen?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hohoho! What do you think, people from beyond the screen?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Do you like this special Christmas gift I have prepared for you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Do you like this special Christmas gift I have prepared for you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Do you like this special Christmas gift I have prepared for you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sure this will be an unforgettable gift in a game of this age rating, no?
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm sure this will be an unforgettable gift in a game of this age rating, no?
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sure this will be an unforgettable gift in a game of this age rating, no?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kgh...! If only... If only I had my glasses, then this C.O. would be...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kgh...! If only... If only I had my glasses, then this C.O. would be...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kgh...! If only... If only I had my glasses, then this C.O. would be...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: How blasphemous of you... to make me appear like this in front of everyone...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: How blasphemous of you... to make me appear like this in front of everyone...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: How blasphemous of you... to make me appear like this in front of everyone...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hahaha. I'm sorry, but I cannot give back your glasses, Sister.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hahaha. I'm sorry, but I cannot give back your glasses, Sister.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hahaha. I'm sorry, but I cannot give back your glasses, Sister.

records.m_Talk_ENG: For only the charm of the arrogant Sister with glasses blooms when she takes them off.
records.m_Talk_DEU: For only the charm of the arrogant Sister with glasses blooms when she takes them off.
records.m_Talk_FRA: For only the charm of the arrogant Sister with glasses blooms when she takes them off.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Glasses are merely restraints used to make an impact.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Glasses are merely restraints used to make an impact.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Glasses are merely restraints used to make an impact.

records.m_Talk_ENG: W-what...? This is nonsense...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: W-what...? This is nonsense...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: W-what...? This is nonsense...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Uh, Brother Chocolat...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Uh, Brother Chocolat...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Uh, Brother Chocolat...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sister Luce did nothing wrong.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sister Luce did nothing wrong.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sister Luce did nothing wrong.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll wear the Santa suit instead... So please give her back her glasses...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll wear the Santa suit instead... So please give her back her glasses...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll wear the Santa suit instead... So please give her back her glasses...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hohohoho! What a noble heart you have!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hohohoho! What a noble heart you have!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hohohoho! What a noble heart you have!

records.m_Talk_ENG: However, now is not the right time.
records.m_Talk_DEU: However, now is not the right time.
records.m_Talk_FRA: However, now is not the right time.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Not... the right time...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Not... the right time...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Not... the right time...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You made a wish, didn't you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You made a wish, didn't you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You made a wish, didn't you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You wished that tonight, the two Sisters would become closer.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You wished that tonight, the two Sisters would become closer.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You wished that tonight, the two Sisters would become closer.

records.m_Talk_ENG: In order to make two people become closer, miracles must occur over and over again.
records.m_Talk_DEU: In order to make two people become closer, miracles must occur over and over again.
records.m_Talk_FRA: In order to make two people become closer, miracles must occur over and over again.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Th-then...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Th-then...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Th-then...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What the heck? Nelson and Specky... didn't come to pick me up?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What the heck? Nelson and Specky... didn't come to pick me up?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What the heck? Nelson and Specky... didn't come to pick me up?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Tch. I can't believe they did this to me... I was going to surprise them...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Tch. I can't believe they did this to me... I was going to surprise them...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Tch. I can't believe they did this to me... I was going to surprise them...

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is no fun. I even gave it my best...
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is no fun. I even gave it my best...
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is no fun. I even gave it my best...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What was that? I think it came from outside the cathedral.
records.m_Talk_DEU: What was that? I think it came from outside the cathedral.
records.m_Talk_FRA: What was that? I think it came from outside the cathedral.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Dammit! How is this chocolate so tough? I can't cut it off with my scythe!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Dammit! How is this chocolate so tough? I can't cut it off with my scythe!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Dammit! How is this chocolate so tough? I can't cut it off with my scythe!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I think only a special weapon can do any damage!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I think only a special weapon can do any damage!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I think only a special weapon can do any damage!

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...How strange.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...How strange.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...How strange.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This chocolate most certainly is a C.O., but I do not detect any Corruption rays.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This chocolate most certainly is a C.O., but I do not detect any Corruption rays.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This chocolate most certainly is a C.O., but I do not detect any Corruption rays.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Tell us the truth, Professor Lee.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Tell us the truth, Professor Lee.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Tell us the truth, Professor Lee.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is this one of your tricks again?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is this one of your tricks again?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is this one of your tricks again?

records.m_Talk_ENG: No! It's not!
records.m_Talk_DEU: No! It's not!
records.m_Talk_FRA: No! It's not!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Its chocolate bonding structure seems to be much tougher and harder than the Category 3 Lone Lee the Rage King!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Its chocolate bonding structure seems to be much tougher and harder than the Category 3 Lone Lee the Rage King!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Its chocolate bonding structure seems to be much tougher and harder than the Category 3 Lone Lee the Rage King!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Maybe it's because that slime powder got mixed with the Solocao!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Maybe it's because that slime powder got mixed with the Solocao!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Maybe it's because that slime powder got mixed with the Solocao!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah, Yuna. Gelatin is just another type of protein!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah, Yuna. Gelatin is just another type of protein!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah, Yuna. Gelatin is just another type of protein!

records.m_Talk_ENG: And protein is easily deformed by heat, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: And protein is easily deformed by heat, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: And protein is easily deformed by heat, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh! I see, Evelyn!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh! I see, Evelyn!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh! I see, Evelyn!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Fireball!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Fireball!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fireball!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Look! It's working! The area that was hit is melting!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Look! It's working! The area that was hit is melting!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Look! It's working! The area that was hit is melting!

records.m_Talk_ENG: But we'll need more firepower!
records.m_Talk_DEU: But we'll need more firepower!
records.m_Talk_FRA: But we'll need more firepower!

records.m_Talk_ENG: If we don't defeat that cake quickly, more of Holy Curia will hear the commotion and gather here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If we don't defeat that cake quickly, more of Holy Curia will hear the commotion and gather here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If we don't defeat that cake quickly, more of Holy Curia will hear the commotion and gather here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If that happens, we might have to live the rest of our lives with those annoying guys on our backs!
records.m_Talk_DEU: If that happens, we might have to live the rest of our lives with those annoying guys on our backs!
records.m_Talk_FRA: If that happens, we might have to live the rest of our lives with those annoying guys on our backs!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I still have payments to make on my loan. I can't back down now!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I still have payments to make on my loan. I can't back down now!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I still have payments to make on my loan. I can't back down now!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Given the circumstances... I guess there's only one thing left to do...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Given the circumstances... I guess there's only one thing left to do...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Given the circumstances... I guess there's only one thing left to do...

records.m_Talk_ENG: YUNA! I allow you to use the Solar Codex! Finish that thing!
records.m_Talk_DEU: YUNA! I allow you to use the Solar Codex! Finish that thing!
records.m_Talk_FRA: YUNA! I allow you to use the Solar Codex! Finish that thing!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh? Really? But you told me not to use it unless we absolutely needed to.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh? Really? But you told me not to use it unless we absolutely needed to.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh? Really? But you told me not to use it unless we absolutely needed to.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You idiot! We absolutely need to use it right now!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You idiot! We absolutely need to use it right now!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You idiot! We absolutely need to use it right now!

records.m_Talk_ENG: The future of our shop is at hand! Hurry up and transform!
records.m_Talk_DEU: The future of our shop is at hand! Hurry up and transform!
records.m_Talk_FRA: The future of our shop is at hand! Hurry up and transform!

records.m_Talk_ENG: O-okay!
records.m_Talk_DEU: O-okay!
records.m_Talk_FRA: O-okay!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Solar Codex set on!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Solar Codex set on!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Solar Codex set on!

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Witch-in-Training, Yuna Springfield, will now
8g!
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Witch-in-Training, Yuna Springfield, will now
8g!
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Witch-in-Training, Yuna Springfield, will now
8g!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hohohohoho! Merry Christmas!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hohohohoho! Merry Christmas!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hohohohoho! Merry Christmas!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sorry, but I have no intention of waiting for you to finish your transformation!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm sorry, but I have no intention of waiting for you to finish your transformation!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sorry, but I have no intention of waiting for you to finish your transformation!

records.m_Talk_ENG: W-whoa!
records.m_Talk_DEU: W-whoa!
records.m_Talk_FRA: W-whoa!

records.m_Talk_ENG: What do I do, Laura?! It got me!
records.m_Talk_DEU: What do I do, Laura?! It got me!
records.m_Talk_FRA: What do I do, Laura?! It got me!

records.m_Talk_ENG: N-no way! That ruthless bastard...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: N-no way! That ruthless bastard...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: N-no way! That ruthless bastard...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Only a coward attacks during transformations. There are no scenes in Necronomiko the Girl Witch where this happens!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Only a coward attacks during transformations. There are no scenes in Necronomiko the Girl Witch where this happens!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Only a coward attacks during transformations. There are no scenes in Necronomiko the Girl Witch where this happens!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kgh, did I make the wrong call?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kgh, did I make the wrong call?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kgh, did I make the wrong call?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hohohohoho! Merry Christmas!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hohohohoho! Merry Christmas!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hohohohoho! Merry Christmas!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now, which Santa girl suit would be best for this little witch?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now, which Santa girl suit would be best for this little witch?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now, which Santa girl suit would be best for this little witch?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ahahahaha! That tickles! Stop it!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ahahahaha! That tickles! Stop it!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ahahahaha! That tickles! Stop it!

records.m_Talk_ENG: E-enough, Brother Chocolat!
records.m_Talk_DEU: E-enough, Brother Chocolat!
records.m_Talk_FRA: E-enough, Brother Chocolat!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You already have enough Santa girls! Those people are our guests!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You already have enough Santa girls! Those people are our guests!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You already have enough Santa girls! Those people are our guests!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hohohoho! No can do!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hohohoho! No can do!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hohohoho! No can do!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Because there can't be too many Santa girls on Christmas...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Because there can't be too many Santa girls on Christmas...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Because there can't be too many Santa girls on Christmas...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Give up, Sister Nelson.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Give up, Sister Nelson.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Give up, Sister Nelson.

records.m_Talk_ENG: S-Sister Luce?
records.m_Talk_DEU: S-Sister Luce?
records.m_Talk_FRA: S-Sister Luce?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It is all over now... People have seen me in this lewd outfit...
records.m_Talk_DEU: It is all over now... People have seen me in this lewd outfit...
records.m_Talk_FRA: It is all over now... People have seen me in this lewd outfit...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I... cannot serve the Lord anymore... I am disqualified to be an Inquisitorial Priest.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I... cannot serve the Lord anymore... I am disqualified to be an Inquisitorial Priest.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I... cannot serve the Lord anymore... I am disqualified to be an Inquisitorial Priest.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? What's everyone doing gathered here?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? What's everyone doing gathered here?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? What's everyone doing gathered here?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mm? That voice?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mm? That voice?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mm? That voice?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why are you all dangling on the roof like Christmas tree ornaments?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why are you all dangling on the roof like Christmas tree ornaments?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why are you all dangling on the roof like Christmas tree ornaments?

records.m_Talk_ENG: And what's with those skimpy outfits?
records.m_Talk_DEU: And what's with those skimpy outfits?
records.m_Talk_FRA: And what's with those skimpy outfits?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Did you try to secretly prepare a Christmas Party with Specky Snob, Claudia?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Did you try to secretly prepare a Christmas Party with Specky Snob, Claudia?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Did you try to secretly prepare a Christmas Party with Specky Snob, Claudia?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sister Looper? That battle uniform... Did you pass the priest evaluation?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sister Looper? That battle uniform... Did you pass the priest evaluation?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sister Looper? That battle uniform... Did you pass the priest evaluation?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sister Looper...? Sister Looper is here...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sister Looper...? Sister Looper is here...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sister Looper...? Sister Looper is here...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hohohohoho! Merry Christmas! We have ourselves a new Sister!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hohohohoho! Merry Christmas! We have ourselves a new Sister!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hohohohoho! Merry Christmas! We have ourselves a new Sister!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? This cake can talk?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? This cake can talk?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? This cake can talk?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Seeing how it's squirming around, Nelson made it, didn't she? See? I told you not to let her cook.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Seeing how it's squirming around, Nelson made it, didn't she? See? I told you not to let her cook.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Seeing how it's squirming around, Nelson made it, didn't she? See? I told you not to let her cook.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But you know, I don't hate her cooking actually.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But you know, I don't hate her cooking actually.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But you know, I don't hate her cooking actually.

records.m_Talk_ENG: They might look a little gross, but they feel great to slice up.
records.m_Talk_DEU: They might look a little gross, but they feel great to slice up.
records.m_Talk_FRA: They might look a little gross, but they feel great to slice up.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now... I think it's time to charge my violence for today with that thing!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Maybe it's because that slime powder got mixed with the Solocao!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Maybe it's because that slime powder got mixed with the Solocao!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Maybe it's because that slime powder got mixed with the Solocao!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah, Yuna. Gelatin is just another type of protein!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah, Yuna. Gelatin is just another type of protein!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah, Yuna. Gelatin is just another type of protein!

root.m_Talk_ENG: And protein is easily deformed by heat, right?
root.m_Talk_DEU: And protein is easily deformed by heat, right?
root.m_Talk_FRA: And protein is easily deformed by heat, right?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh! I see, Evelyn!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh! I see, Evelyn!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh! I see, Evelyn!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Fireball!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Fireball!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Fireball!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Look! It's working! The area that was hit is melting!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Look! It's working! The area that was hit is melting!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Look! It's working! The area that was hit is melting!

root.m_Talk_ENG: But we'll need more firepower!
root.m_Talk_DEU: But we'll need more firepower!
root.m_Talk_FRA: But we'll need more firepower!

root.m_Talk_ENG: If we don't defeat that cake quickly, more of Holy Curia will hear the commotion and gather here.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If we don't defeat that cake quickly, more of Holy Curia will hear the commotion and gather here.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If we don't defeat that cake quickly, more of Holy Curia will hear the commotion and gather here.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If that happens, we might have to live the rest of our lives with those annoying guys on our backs!
root.m_Talk_DEU: If that happens, we might have to live the rest of our lives with those annoying guys on our backs!
root.m_Talk_FRA: If that happens, we might have to live the rest of our lives with those annoying guys on our backs!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I still have payments to make on my loan. I can't back down now!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I still have payments to make on my loan. I can't back down now!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I still have payments to make on my loan. I can't back down now!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Given the circumstances... I guess there's only one thing left to do...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Given the circumstances... I guess there's only one thing left to do...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Given the circumstances... I guess there's only one thing left to do...

root.m_Talk_ENG: YUNA! I allow you to use the Solar Codex! Finish that thing!
root.m_Talk_DEU: YUNA! I allow you to use the Solar Codex! Finish that thing!
root.m_Talk_FRA: YUNA! I allow you to use the Solar Codex! Finish that thing!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh? Really? But you told me not to use it unless we absolutely needed to.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh? Really? But you told me not to use it unless we absolutely needed to.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh? Really? But you told me not to use it unless we absolutely needed to.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You idiot! We absolutely need to use it right now!
root.m_Talk_DEU: You idiot! We absolutely need to use it right now!
root.m_Talk_FRA: You idiot! We absolutely need to use it right now!

root.m_Talk_ENG: The future of our shop is at hand! Hurry up and transform!
root.m_Talk_DEU: The future of our shop is at hand! Hurry up and transform!
root.m_Talk_FRA: The future of our shop is at hand! Hurry up and transform!

root.m_Talk_ENG: O-okay!
root.m_Talk_DEU: O-okay!
root.m_Talk_FRA: O-okay!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Solar Codex set on!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Solar Codex set on!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Solar Codex set on!

root.m_Talk_ENG:
Witch-in-Training, Yuna Springfield, will now
8g!
root.m_Talk_DEU:
Witch-in-Training, Yuna Springfield, will now
8g!
root.m_Talk_FRA:
Witch-in-Training, Yuna Springfield, will now
8g!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hohohohoho! Merry Christmas!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hohohohoho! Merry Christmas!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hohohohoho! Merry Christmas!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sorry, but I have no intention of waiting for you to finish your transformation!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm sorry, but I have no intention of waiting for you to finish your transformation!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sorry, but I have no intention of waiting for you to finish your transformation!

root.m_Talk_ENG: W-whoa!
root.m_Talk_DEU: W-whoa!
root.m_Talk_FRA: W-whoa!

root.m_Talk_ENG: What do I do, Laura?! It got me!
root.m_Talk_DEU: What do I do, Laura?! It got me!
root.m_Talk_FRA: What do I do, Laura?! It got me!

root.m_Talk_ENG: N-no way! That ruthless bastard...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: N-no way! That ruthless bastard...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: N-no way! That ruthless bastard...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Only a coward attacks during transformations. There are no scenes in Necronomiko the Girl Witch where this happens!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Only a coward attacks during transformations. There are no scenes in Necronomiko the Girl Witch where this happens!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Only a coward attacks during transformations. There are no scenes in Necronomiko the Girl Witch where this happens!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Kgh, did I make the wrong call?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Kgh, did I make the wrong call?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Kgh, did I make the wrong call?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hohohohoho! Merry Christmas!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hohohohoho! Merry Christmas!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hohohohoho! Merry Christmas!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Now, which Santa girl suit would be best for this little witch?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Now, which Santa girl suit would be best for this little witch?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Now, which Santa girl suit would be best for this little witch?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ahahahaha! That tickles! Stop it!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ahahahaha! That tickles! Stop it!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ahahahaha! That tickles! Stop it!

root.m_Talk_ENG: E-enough, Brother Chocolat!
root.m_Talk_DEU: E-enough, Brother Chocolat!
root.m_Talk_FRA: E-enough, Brother Chocolat!

root.m_Talk_ENG: You already have enough Santa girls! Those people are our guests!
root.m_Talk_DEU: You already have enough Santa girls! Those people are our guests!
root.m_Talk_FRA: You already have enough Santa girls! Those people are our guests!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hohohoho! No can do!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hohohoho! No can do!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hohohoho! No can do!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Because there can't be too many Santa girls on Christmas...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Because there can't be too many Santa girls on Christmas...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Because there can't be too many Santa girls on Christmas...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Give up, Sister Nelson.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Give up, Sister Nelson.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Give up, Sister Nelson.

root.m_Talk_ENG: S-Sister Luce?
root.m_Talk_DEU: S-Sister Luce?
root.m_Talk_FRA: S-Sister Luce?

root.m_Talk_ENG: It is all over now... People have seen me in this lewd outfit...
root.m_Talk_DEU: It is all over now... People have seen me in this lewd outfit...
root.m_Talk_FRA: It is all over now... People have seen me in this lewd outfit...

root.m_Talk_ENG: I... cannot serve the Lord anymore... I am disqualified to be an Inquisitorial Priest.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I... cannot serve the Lord anymore... I am disqualified to be an Inquisitorial Priest.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I... cannot serve the Lord anymore... I am disqualified to be an Inquisitorial Priest.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? What's everyone doing gathered here?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? What's everyone doing gathered here?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? What's everyone doing gathered here?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Mm? That voice?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Mm? That voice?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Mm? That voice?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Why are you all dangling on the roof like Christmas tree ornaments?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Why are you all dangling on the roof like Christmas tree ornaments?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Why are you all dangling on the roof like Christmas tree ornaments?

root.m_Talk_ENG: And what's with those skimpy outfits?
root.m_Talk_DEU: And what's with those skimpy outfits?
root.m_Talk_FRA: And what's with those skimpy outfits?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Did you try to secretly prepare a Christmas Party with Specky Snob, Claudia?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Did you try to secretly prepare a Christmas Party with Specky Snob, Claudia?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Did you try to secretly prepare a Christmas Party with Specky Snob, Claudia?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Sister Looper? That battle uniform... Did you pass the priest evaluation?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Sister Looper? That battle uniform... Did you pass the priest evaluation?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Sister Looper? That battle uniform... Did you pass the priest evaluation?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Sister Looper...? Sister Looper is here...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Sister Looper...? Sister Looper is here...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Sister Looper...? Sister Looper is here...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hohohohoho! Merry Christmas! We have ourselves a new Sister!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hohohohoho! Merry Christmas! We have ourselves a new Sister!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hohohohoho! Merry Christmas! We have ourselves a new Sister!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? This cake can talk?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? This cake can talk?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? This cake can talk?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Seeing how it's squirming around, Nelson made it, didn't she? See? I told you not to let her cook.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Seeing how it's squirming around, Nelson made it, didn't she? See? I told you not to let her cook.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Seeing how it's squirming around, Nelson made it, didn't she? See? I told you not to let her cook.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But you know, I don't hate her cooking actually.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But you know, I don't hate her cooking actually.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But you know, I don't hate her cooking actually.

root.m_Talk_ENG: They might look a little gross, but they feel great to slice up.
root.m_Talk_DEU: They might look a little gross, but they feel great to slice up.
root.m_Talk_FRA: They might look a little gross, but they feel great to slice up.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Now... I think it's time to charge my violence for today with that thing!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Now... I think it's time to charge my violence for today with that thing!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Now... I think it's time to charge my violence for today with that thing!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Come at me, stupid cake! I'll cut you up into little pieces so everyone here can have a piece of you!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Come at me, stupid cake! I'll cut you up into little pieces so everyone here can have a piece of you!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Come at me, stupid cake! I'll cut you up into little pieces so everyone here can have a piece of you!
